substance_notes: Orange S.A. has held its stake in Orange Polska S.A. since the early 2000s (well in excess of 2 years). Royalty payments relate to brand and technology licences under the Orange trademark — DEMPE functions (R&D strategy, brand governance, IP protection) are controlled centrally by Orange S.A. Annual royalty payments from Orange Polska to Orange S.A. are estimated to significantly exceed PLN 2,000,000. Art. 12 scope verification required: confirm that brand and technology licence fees fall within the Art. 12(3) definition in the 1975 Poland-France DTC (DzU 1977 poz. 5).
